about.metaDescription: Meet the bilingual team at Allsberry Insurance Agency. 10 licensed agents — including Spanish-speaking staff — helping Southern California families and businesses protect what matters most.
about.heading: Local insurance guidance since 1994
about.subheading: Three decades helping Southern California families, homeowners, and business owners.

story.heading: Our story
story.paragraph1: Allsberry Insurance Agency started in 1994 as a small local office serving Corona and the surrounding Inland Empire. Since then we've grown into a Southern California team of licensed agents — but the way we work hasn't changed. We pick up the phone. We answer questions in plain language. And we treat every client like a neighbor, because most of them are.
story.paragraph2: Erin Allsberry took over ownership in 2009 and has built the agency into one of Farmers Insurance's most recognized offices in the region. Today our agents handle everything from first-time renters policies to complex commercial programs, always with the same goal: make insurance straightforward.

home.name: Home Insurance
home.description: Protect your home, belongings, and peace of mind with dependable coverage.

auto.name: Auto Insurance
auto.description: Protection for your car, your daily drive, and the surprises on the road.

renters.name: Renters Insurance
renters.description: Affordable protection for your stuff. It also helps pay for a place to stay if your rental can't be lived in.

life.name: Life Insurance
life.description: Helps take care of the people you love if something happens to you. Getting started is quick, safe, and private.

umbrella.name: Umbrella Insurance
umbrella.description: Extra protection that helps pay for big costs your other insurance doesn't fully cover.

condo.name: Condo Insurance
condo.description: Covers what's inside your condo. Your building's insurance protects the outside, but you need your own plan for your stuff and walls.

general-liability.name: General Liability
general-liability.description: Pays for costs if a customer gets hurt at your business, something gets broken, or someone sues you.

workers-comp.name: Workers Compensation
workers-comp.description: Helps pay for medical bills and lost wages if an employee gets hurt on the job. Required by California law for most businesses.

commercial-property.name: Commercial Property
commercial-property.description: Protects your building, equipment, and the things you need to run your business every day.

commercial-auto.name: Commercial Auto
commercial-auto.description: Covers the cars and trucks your business uses, including your drivers and the things you carry.

professional-liability.name: Professional Liability
professional-liability.description: Helps pay the costs if a client says your work or advice caused them to lose money, even if it was an honest mistake.

specialty-coverage.name: Specialty Coverage
specialty-coverage.description: For things that don't fit a normal plan, like special equipment, unique businesses, or unusual properties.

business.name: Business Insurance
business.description: One package that puts together the different types of insurance your business needs.

other.name: Other Coverage
other.description: Tell us what you need and we will point you in the right direction.

q1.question: What types of insurance can Allsberry Insurance Agency help me quote?
q1.answer: We help people in Southern California compare insurance for their home, car, rental, condo, business, employees, life, and more.

q2.question: How fast will someone follow up after I request a quote?
q2.answer: A licensed team member will get back to you within one business day. If your request is simple and we have the info we need, it's often even faster.

q3.question: Can you help with evidence of insurance or certificates of insurance?
q3.answer: Yes. If your bank, landlord, or another company needs proof that you have insurance, we can send them the right paperwork quickly.

q4.question: Do I need to bundle home and auto insurance to work with the agency?
q4.answer: No. Combining your insurance can sometimes save money, but we're happy to help with just one type of insurance if that's all you need.

q5.question: Is my data private and secure?
q5.answer: Yes. Your phone calls, texts, and emails with us are all protected. We never share your personal information without your permission. You can read more about how we protect your data through the Farmers privacy center.

classicCars.name: Classic car collector
classicCars.body: I am happy and confident having all my personal, family, and business insurance needs taken care of with the team here. Anytime I call with a question or a need they are happy to help and treat me like I am a top priority. Recently Erin was able to also help me in a big way — I have a few classic cars and to my surprise she was able to get my cars insured through Hagerty with great coverage.

homeowner.name: Corona homeowner
homeowner.body: The whole team made switching our home insurance simple. They walked us through every step and found a plan that actually fit our family. No pressure, just honest advice.

restaurant.name: Local restaurant owner
restaurant.body: Brahm handled our business coverage from day one. He was organized, answered every question, and helped us figure out what we actually needed versus what we could skip. Highly recommend.

auto.name: Auto insurance client
auto.body: First time I ever felt like someone actually looked at my auto policy instead of just renewing it. The advice was practical and I ended up with better coverage for less.
